Channel Model: Japan Online Banking Transfer to Corporate Account
Supported Currencies: JPY / USDT
(USDT issuance is based on XE rate +8)
Single Deposit Limit: 10,000 JPY - 2,000,000 JPY
Single Payment Limit: 30,000 JPY - 2,000,000 JPY
Single Issuance Limit: None
USDT Issuance Limit: 1 million JPY
JPY Issuance Transaction Hours: 24/7
USDT Issuance Service Hours: 8 AM - 00 AM
Settlement Time: 24/7
Arrival Time: Normally 5-10 minutes; will be notified separately on holidays or other factors
Customer Service Hours: 24/7
Day-to-Day Cut-off Time: None
Maintenance Time: Daily Japan Time 2-4 AM and Sunday 7 PM to Monday 8 AM: System service will be suspended (including online banking, ATMs, etc.)
⚠️
 Important Notes 
⚠️
⭐️
 Types of Services Accepted: Legitimate BC/Licensed Forex
⭐️
 Only accepts BC and forex funds. We do not accept funds for illegal activities such as pig slaughtering, fraud, telecom fraud, arms dealing, finance, drugs, online lending, or fraudulent transactions. If non-BC funds are discovered, the merchant's balance will be immediately frozen and the channel suspended.
⭐️
 Members submitting refund requests to the bank must complete the follow-up processing within 3 days. If not processed, we will agree to refund and deduct the amount from the merchant's balance.
⭐️
 Legal / Complaints / Risk Control
Legal matters and bank freezes do not guarantee the balance. Merchants need to manage their own balances. Multiple payment orders will be issued. Merchants will be notified every 500,000 (Note: Balance is not guaranteed). Please manage your balance carefully.
⭐️
 After operation begins, 1 million of the merchant's remaining balance will be deducted for the next account card fee. In the event of a dead account, the merchant's remaining balance is not guaranteed. Please manage your remaining balance carefully.

Notification for the Launch of a New RAAST QR Channel in Pakistan:
Advantages of RAAST QR:
1. Lower fees compared to other methods.
2. Applicable to all banks.
3. Compatible with all mobile wallets (Easypaisa, Jazzcash).
4. Fast (no need to wait for one-time passwords).
5. No need to handle issues related to one-time passwords.
6. Supports automatic callback feature.
7. Provides sufficient payment time for customers.
Settlement time for RAAST QR code payments: Real-time (D0)
RAAST QR code payment order amount: 100-50,000
Order timeout and validity: 24 hours (after the user generates the QR code, payment must be completed within 24 hours)
Callback system: API (automated)
Integration credentials: All credentials, API, and keys 
🔑
 remain consistent
Payment method: Pakistani banks that support QR code payments (almost all banks and mobile wallets support QR code payments)

Payment Name: OKEXpay Thailand
Recharge Limit: 100 - 10,000 Thai Baht
Debit Limit: 100 - 50,000 Thai Baht
Settlement Cycle: D0
Payment Mode: PromptPay Scan Code
Issuance Mode: Back U (Real-time quotation from water merchants)
Back U Service Time: 12:00 - 22:00 (GMT+8)
Channel Service Time: 7 × 24H
Customer Service Time: 7 × 24H
Risk Control Complaint: 1:1  Freeze
Judicial: 1:1 Freeze + 40,000 THB for handling reserve fund freeze 
Note:
Product Registration: Only accepting BC and games. Official independent websites without any disputes. (One verification per product). All product URLs must be registered in advance during the connection process for review by the third party. If it is found that unregistered URLs are used for promotion resulting in account funds being frozen, we will bear all responsibilities.
[JURISPRUDENCE]
Complaint situation: 1:1 compensation for complaints or fraud reports; multiple malicious complaints will result in the closure of the channel.
Processing fees:
With receipts: such as lawyer fees, air tickets, accommodation, transportation, refund amounts.
Without receipts: for expenses like tea and water, which cannot be proven, but the merchant can send someone to go with the channel staff. 
Does it include legal services? No.
Back-end reconciliation: Supported.
Customer trading account type restrictions: Limited to regular type products only.
Customer opening account daily volume requirement: No limit. ——————————————————
Note:
Prohibit the access of pyramid schemes, quick kill, cash loans, investment and wealth management products;
The platform can conduct full monitoring. In case of any violation, all settlement and uncollected funds will be frozen;
Judicial:
Due to the serious situation of dead cards recently, all merchants must ensure that the inner group function is activated. 
If an account is frozen due to customer complaints, please promptly remind the customer to withdraw the complaint to expedite the processing. After the freeze is lifted, the funds will be returned to the merchant according to the process.
1. We are not responsible for any judicial freezes. In case of judicial action, we will first freeze the funds at a 1:1 ratio.
2. The platform does not assume responsibility for judicial freezes. If a bank card is frozen due to customer reporting, the customer is responsible for the risk control cost of the bank card, which is 30,000 Thai Baht per card.

 Important Notes

⭐️
 Types of Services Accepted: Legitimate BC/Licensed Forex
⭐️
 Only accepts BC and forex funds. We do not accept funds for illegal activities such as pig slaughtering, fraud, telecom fraud, arms dealing, finance, drugs, online lending, or fraudulent transactions. If non-BC funds are discovered, the merchant's balance will be immediately frozen and the channel suspended.
⭐️
 Members submitting refund requests to the bank must complete the follow-up processing within 3 days. If not processed, we will agree to refund and deduct the amount from the merchant's balance.
⭐️
 Legal / Complaints / Risk Control
Legal matters and bank freezes do not guarantee the balance. Merchants need to manage their own balances. Multiple payment orders will be issued. Merchants will be notified every 500,000 (Note: Balance is not guaranteed). Please manage your balance carefully.
⭐️
 After operation begins, 1 million of the merchant's remaining balance will be deducted for the next account card fee. In the event of a dead account, the merchant's remaining balance is not guaranteed. Please manage your remaining balance carefully.

Arrival Time: Normally 5-10 minutes; will be notified separately on holidays or other factors

Maintenance Time: Daily Japan Time 2-4 AM and Sunday 7 PM to Monday 8 AM: System service will be suspended (including online banking, ATMs, etc.)
⚠️
 Important Notes 
⚠️
⭐️
 Types of Services Accepted: Legitimate BC/Licensed Forex
⭐️
 Only accepts BC and forex funds. We do not accept funds for illegal activities such as pig slaughtering, fraud, telecom fraud, arms dealing, finance, drugs, online lending, or fraudulent transactions. If non-BC funds are discovered, the merchant's balance will be immediately frozen and the channel suspended.
⭐️
 Members submitting refund requests to the bank must complete the follow-up processing within 3 days. If not processed, we will agree to refund and deduct the amount from the merchant's balance.
⭐️
 Legal / Complaints / Risk Control
Legal matters and bank freezes do not guarantee the balance. Merchants need to manage their own balances. Multiple payment orders will be issued. Merchants will be notified every 500,000 (Note: Balance is not guaranteed). Please manage your balance carefully.
⭐️
 After operation begins, 1 million of the merchant's remaining balance will be deducted for the next account card fee. In the event of a dead account, the merchant's remaining balance is not guaranteed. Please manage your remaining balance carefully.

【Account Opening Requirements】
1️⃣
 IP Whitelist
To ensure account security, provide a withdrawal IP whitelist.
2️⃣
 Product Type
Category 1/Category 4 (XJD)
3️⃣
 Account Freeze Rules
✅
 Account losses resulting from failure to freeze funds shall be borne by the payment channel. This includes situations where the receiving account is reported by your company's members or used for online telecommunication fraud (e.g., if an account is frozen due to merchant reasons, mixed-card merchants will have a corresponding proportion of their account balance temporarily frozen; dedicated-card merchants must freeze the corresponding balance in the dedicated card. The frozen amount will be refunded after the merchant assists in resolving the issue).
Example: For a transaction amount of 5,000 THB, 5,000 THB must be temporarily frozen. If litigation is withdrawn or dismissed without refund, the frozen amount will automatically be unfrozen.
✴️
For dedicated card merchants, if a card is frozen due to a complaint, the payment channel bears the card fee for the first occurrence. Subsequent occurrences are borne by the corresponding merchant.
✴️
 Refuse “Category 3” orders. Concealing such orders will result in non-settlement of the merchant's balance.
✴️
 Actively address customer complaints to prevent escalation and unnecessary losses due to delayed resolution.
Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

Dear Pakistani Merchants
🇵🇰
:
Due to official requirements regarding transaction volume ratios for the easypaisa/jazzcash channels, our company has implemented the following adjustments.
When conducting transactions via easypaisa, at least 70% of the transaction amount must be processed through jazzcash.
Example:
Processing 7 million via jazzcash allows for a 10 million transaction limit via easypaisa.
Processing 14 million via jazzcash allows for a 20 million transaction limit via easypaisa.
And so on.
We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

 Account losses resulting from failure to freeze funds shall be borne by the payment channel. ✴️

Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

 IP Whitelist

 Account Freeze Rules
✅
 Account losses resulting from failure to freeze funds shall be borne by the payment channel. This includes situations where the receiving account is reported by your company's members or used for online telecommunication fraud (e.g., if an account is frozen due to merchant reasons, mixed-card merchants will have a corresponding proportion of their account balance temporarily frozen; dedicated-card merchants must freeze the corresponding balance in the dedicated card. The frozen amount will be refunded after the merchant assists in resolving the issue).
Example: For a transaction amount of 5,000 THB, 5,000 THB must be temporarily frozen. If litigation is withdrawn or dismissed without refund, the frozen amount will automatically be unfrozen.
✴️
For dedicated card merchants, if a card is frozen due to a complaint, the payment channel bears the card fee for the first occurrence. Subsequent occurrences are borne by the corresponding merchant.
✴️
 Refuse “Category 3” orders. Concealing such orders will result in non-settlement of the merchant's balance.
✴️
 Actively address customer complaints to prevent escalation and unnecessary losses due to delayed resolution.
Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

:

When conducting transactions via easypaisa, at least 70% of the transaction amount must be processed through jazzcash.
Example:
Processing 7 million via jazzcash allows for a 10 million transaction limit via easypaisa.
Processing 14 million via jazzcash allows for a 20 million transaction limit via easypaisa.
And so on.
We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

 Account Freeze Rules
✅
 Account losses resulting from failure to freeze funds shall be borne by the payment channel. This includes situations where the receiving account is reported by your company's members or used for online telecommunication fraud (e.g., if an account is frozen due to merchant reasons, mixed-card merchants will have a corresponding proportion of their account balance temporarily frozen; dedicated-card merchants must freeze the corresponding balance in the dedicated card. The frozen amount will be refunded after the merchant assists in resolving the issue).
Example: For a transaction amount of 5,000 THB, 5,000 THB must be temporarily frozen. If litigation is withdrawn or dismissed without refund, the frozen amount will automatically be unfrozen.
✴️
For dedicated card merchants, if a card is frozen due to a complaint, the payment channel bears the card fee for the first occurrence. Subsequent occurrences are borne by the corresponding merchant.
✴️
 Refuse “Category 3” orders. Concealing such orders will result in non-settlement of the merchant's balance.
✴️
 Actively address customer complaints to prevent escalation and unnecessary losses due to delayed resolution.
Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

Dear Pakistani Merchants
🇵🇰
:
Due to official requirements regarding transaction volume ratios for the easypaisa/jazzcash channels, our company has implemented the following adjustments.
When conducting transactions via easypaisa, at least 70% of the transaction amount must be processed through jazzcash.
Example:
Processing 7 million via jazzcash allows for a 10 million transaction limit via easypaisa.
Processing 14 million via jazzcash allows for a 20 million transaction limit via easypaisa.
And so on.
We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

 Account Freeze Rules
✅
 Account losses resulting from failure to freeze funds shall be borne by the payment channel. This includes situations where the receiving account is reported by your company's members or used for online telecommunication fraud (e.g., if an account is frozen due to merchant reasons, mixed-card merchants will have a corresponding proportion of their account balance temporarily frozen; dedicated-card merchants must freeze the corresponding balance in the dedicated card. The frozen amount will be refunded after the merchant assists in resolving the issue).
Example: For a transaction amount of 5,000 THB, 5,000 THB must be temporarily frozen. If litigation is withdrawn or dismissed without refund, the frozen amount will automatically be unfrozen.
✴️
For dedicated card merchants, if a card is frozen due to a complaint, the payment channel bears the card fee for the first occurrence. Subsequent occurrences are borne by the corresponding merchant.
✴️
 Refuse “Category 3” orders. Concealing such orders will result in non-settlement of the merchant's balance.
✴️
 Actively address customer complaints to prevent escalation and unnecessary losses due to delayed resolution.
Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

:

And so on.

2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases

- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.

Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

 IP Whitelist

 Account Freeze Rules
✅
 Account losses resulting from failure to freeze funds shall be borne by the payment channel. This includes situations where the receiving account is reported by your company's members or used for online telecommunication fraud (e.g., if an account is frozen due to merchant reasons, mixed-card merchants will have a corresponding proportion of their account balance temporarily frozen; dedicated-card merchants must freeze the corresponding balance in the dedicated card. The frozen amount will be refunded after the merchant assists in resolving the issue).
Example: For a transaction amount of 5,000 THB, 5,000 THB must be temporarily frozen. If litigation is withdrawn or dismissed without refund, the frozen amount will automatically be unfrozen.
✴️
For dedicated card merchants, if a card is frozen due to a complaint, the payment channel bears the card fee for the first occurrence. Subsequent occurrences are borne by the corresponding merchant.
✴️
 Refuse “Category 3” orders. Concealing such orders will result in non-settlement of the merchant's balance.
✴️
 Actively address customer complaints to prevent escalation and unnecessary losses due to delayed resolution.
Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

Dear Pakistani Merchants
🇵🇰
:
Due to official requirements regarding transaction volume ratios for the easypaisa/jazzcash channels, our company has implemented the following adjustments.
When conducting transactions via easypaisa, at least 70% of the transaction amount must be processed through jazzcash.
Example:
Processing 7 million via jazzcash allows for a 10 million transaction limit via easypaisa.
Processing 14 million via jazzcash allows for a 20 million transaction limit via easypaisa.
And so on.
We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

1️⃣
 IP Whitelist

 Product Type

 Account Freeze Rules
✅
 Account losses resulting from failure to freeze funds shall be borne by the payment channel. This includes situations where the receiving account is reported by your company's members or used for online telecommunication fraud (e.g., if an account is frozen due to merchant reasons, mixed-card merchants will have a corresponding proportion of their account balance temporarily frozen; dedicated-card merchants must freeze the corresponding balance in the dedicated card. The frozen amount will be refunded after the merchant assists in resolving the issue).
Example: For a transaction amount of 5,000 THB, 5,000 THB must be temporarily frozen. If litigation is withdrawn or dismissed without refund, the frozen amount will automatically be unfrozen.
✴️
For dedicated card merchants, if a card is frozen due to a complaint, the payment channel bears the card fee for the first occurrence. Subsequent occurrences are borne by the corresponding merchant.
✴️
 Refuse “Category 3” orders. Concealing such orders will result in non-settlement of the merchant's balance.
✴️
 Actively address customer complaints to prevent escalation and unnecessary losses due to delayed resolution.
Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

Dear Pakistani Merchants
🇵🇰
:
Due to official requirements regarding transaction volume ratios for the easypaisa/jazzcash channels, our company has implemented the following adjustments.
When conducting transactions via easypaisa, at least 70% of the transaction amount must be processed through jazzcash.
Example:
Processing 7 million via jazzcash allows for a 10 million transaction limit via easypaisa.
Processing 14 million via jazzcash allows for a 20 million transaction limit via easypaisa.
And so on.
We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

 Account Freeze Rules
✅
 Account losses resulting from failure to freeze funds shall be borne by the payment channel. This includes situations where the receiving account is reported by your company's members or used for online telecommunication fraud (e.g., if an account is frozen due to merchant reasons, mixed-card merchants will have a corresponding proportion of their account balance temporarily frozen; dedicated-card merchants must freeze the corresponding balance in the dedicated card. The frozen amount will be refunded after the merchant assists in resolving the issue).
Example: For a transaction amount of 5,000 THB, 5,000 THB must be temporarily frozen. If litigation is withdrawn or dismissed without refund, the frozen amount will automatically be unfrozen.
✴️
For dedicated card merchants, if a card is frozen due to a complaint, the payment channel bears the card fee for the first occurrence. Subsequent occurrences are borne by the corresponding merchant.
✴️
 Refuse “Category 3” orders. Concealing such orders will result in non-settlement of the merchant's balance.
✴️
 Actively address customer complaints to prevent escalation and unnecessary losses due to delayed resolution.
Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.

If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:

3) Website-Related Police Investigations

- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

 IP Whitelist

 Account Freeze Rules
✅
 Account losses resulting from failure to freeze funds shall be borne by the payment channel. This includes situations where the receiving account is reported by your company's members or used for online telecommunication fraud (e.g., if an account is frozen due to merchant reasons, mixed-card merchants will have a corresponding proportion of their account balance temporarily frozen; dedicated-card merchants must freeze the corresponding balance in the dedicated card. The frozen amount will be refunded after the merchant assists in resolving the issue).
Example: For a transaction amount of 5,000 THB, 5,000 THB must be temporarily frozen. If litigation is withdrawn or dismissed without refund, the frozen amount will automatically be unfrozen.
✴️
For dedicated card merchants, if a card is frozen due to a complaint, the payment channel bears the card fee for the first occurrence. Subsequent occurrences are borne by the corresponding merchant.
✴️
 Refuse “Category 3” orders. Concealing such orders will result in non-settlement of the merchant's balance.
✴️
 Actively address customer complaints to prevent escalation and unnecessary losses due to delayed resolution.
Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

 IP Whitelist

 Account Freeze Rules
✅
 Account losses resulting from failure to freeze funds shall be borne by the payment channel. This includes situations where the receiving account is reported by your company's members or used for online telecommunication fraud (e.g., if an account is frozen due to merchant reasons, mixed-card merchants will have a corresponding proportion of their account balance temporarily frozen; dedicated-card merchants must freeze the corresponding balance in the dedicated card. The frozen amount will be refunded after the merchant assists in resolving the issue).
Example: For a transaction amount of 5,000 THB, 5,000 THB must be temporarily frozen. If litigation is withdrawn or dismissed without refund, the frozen amount will automatically be unfrozen.
✴️
For dedicated card merchants, if a card is frozen due to a complaint, the payment channel bears the card fee for the first occurrence. Subsequent occurrences are borne by the corresponding merchant.
✴️
 Refuse “Category 3” orders. Concealing such orders will result in non-settlement of the merchant's balance.
✴️
 Actively address customer complaints to prevent escalation and unnecessary losses due to delayed resolution.
Police and Dispute Cases
1) Customer Fraud Reports
If a merchant's customer reports an account or case as fraudulent, the merchant shall bear full responsibility for:
- Repaying or refunding the entire fraudulent amount;
- Covering all police fees and related expenses to resolve the case.
2) Customer Loss/Complaint Cases
If an account is reported due to customer loss, customer complaint, or any issue directly involving the merchant's customer:
- The merchant associated with that customer shall be responsible for settling the disputed amount.
- In this case, we will handle and cover the police fees required to close the case.
3) Website-Related Police Investigations
If police investigations trace the issue to the website and it involves our bank account:
- The website administrator shall be responsible for communicating with relevant authorities and resolving the case.

 OKexPAY: The Trusted Choice for Global Payments

🚀
 Empowering Your Business with Security and Efficiency
OKexPAY is a leading global payment gateway provider specializing in delivering secure, efficient payment solutions for game developers, trading platforms, and other non-fraudulent products. Our services span multiple countries including India 
🇮🇳
, Bangladesh 
🇧🇩
, Pakistan 
🇵🇰
, the Philippines 
🇵🇭
, and Nigeria 
🇳🇬
. With years of industry expertise and technological innovation, we are committed to delivering seamless, reliable payment experiences that empower businesses to thrive in the digital economy!
🔒
 Absolute Trustworthiness, Solemn Commitment
Integrity is the cornerstone of OKexPAY! Leveraging extensive experience and cutting-edge technology, we solemnly pledge to the market: OKexPAY will fully compensate for any fund losses attributable to our operational failures! We employ advanced encryption, rigorous risk control systems, and strict compliance protocols to ensure every transaction is secure and transparent. With instant USDT settlement, your funds flow efficiently, flexibly, and conveniently! 
💸
🌐
 24/7 Exceptional Service
Customer first, service foremost! OKExPAY delivers uninterrupted 24/7 support, providing tailored solutions for gaming operators, forex trading platforms, and more. Simple integration, user-friendly payment interfaces, multi-currency support, and fully automated transaction workflows—combined with local market insights and global vision—propelling your business to new heights!
⚠️
 Beware of Low-Price Scam Traps
Recently, fraudsters have lured merchants into transactions via their channels with abnormally low prices or fake promotions, resulting in financial losses. OKexPAY strongly advises: Always cross-verify information, never trust unusually low offers, and never disclose sensitive data!
💼
 Why Choose OKexPAY?
✅
 Permanently Free: Zero setup fees, no KYC required—just submit your product link for instant activation!
✅
 Reputation Guaranteed: Years of market validation, robust capital strength, and risk control capabilities.
✅
 Instant USDT Settlement: Fast, secure, and flexible fund processing.
✅
 Global Coverage: Supports multiple currencies and payment methods, connecting you to worldwide business opportunities.
OKexPAY is not just a payment service provider—it's your reliable partner in the global marketplace! Let's advance together and create a prosperous future!
